description_long: This object depicts a small residential neighborhood scene featuring several modern, flat-roofed houses arranged along a central paved road with a crosswalk. The houses are surrounded by green lawns, trees, and shrubbery, with some properties including blue swimming pools and outdoor seating areas. The buildings are primarily rectangular with clean lines, large windows, and minimal ornamentation, reflecting a contemporary architectural style. The scene includes a mix of single- and two-story structures, with one prominent building at the end of the road. The landscaping is well-maintained, with clear separations between properties and a variety of greenery. The overall layout suggests a suburban or upscale urban residential area.
description: A modern residential neighborhood with several flat-roofed houses, green lawns, trees, and swimming pools arranged along a central paved road. The buildings feature large windows and clean, contemporary lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central road, crosswalk, and the main facades of the houses with visible lawns, pools, and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lots, the arrangement of houses, and the prominent building at the end of the road.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, pools, and the overall symmetry of the neighborhood layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the green spaces, rear facades, and the spatial relationship between the houses and the road.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small overhangs or porches, and minimal decorative elements.
